Capitalism has two forms. A modern [[Alienators|Alienator]] and a beneficial economic system<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gW6djxNs270</ref>

Lifeism abstains from taking dogmatic positions on economics such as capitalism vs [[socialism]]. 

== Pillars of Capitalism ==

# [[Limited Liability Corporation]]
# [[Fractional Reserve Banking]]
# [[Liberal Democracy]]
# [[Trade Unions]]

== See Also ==

* [[Deirdre McCloskey]]
* [[Economics]]
* [[Socialism]]

== References ==
[[Category:Economics]]
[[Category:Alienators]]
[[sn:Capitalism]]Capitalism has two forms. A modern [[Alienators|Alienator]] and a beneficial economic system<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gW6djxNs270</ref>

== Pillars of Capitalism ==

# [[Limited Liability Corporation]]
# [[Fractional Reserve Banking]]
# [[Liberal Democracy]]
# [[Trade Unions]]

== See Also ==

* [[Deirdre McCloskey]]

== References ==
[[Category:Economics]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
